title: [codereview-1] schema.json ccp_vector nesting fixed but additionalProperties:true may permit invalid fields in v2 vectors; consider exhaustive properties list and oneOf for vector subtypes per CCP-15
close_reason: Fixed schema.json ccp_vector with exhaustive properties list (added all fields from ccp15.json density_estimate_high and others: neighbor_count, avg_rssi_dbm, exceeds_high_threshold, busy_time_pct, channel_scores nesting with additionalProperties, per as number, expected_channel etc.), fixed JSON structure after edits, validated with Draft7Validator (both ccp files now VALID). Performed schema updates in logical chunks with 3 codereview passes (findings filed as project-LICHEN-5qg0 and similar tagged codereview; all fixed with no remaining P0-P2 issues after passes). Updated per CCP-15 oneOf subtype intent via exhaustive flat + nesting. Ran bd ready | head -5.
